expectations.evidence: No explicit mention of unpinned action versions (semver vs SHA pinning). Issue #12 mentions Node version pinning but not action SHA pinning for actions/checkout@v4 or actions/setup-node@v4
No mention of unnamed run steps. The analysis covers duplicate step names and timeout issues but not the lack of name: fields on individual run steps
Issue #3 Duplicate Step Names in Lint Job (HIGH) - Both steps have identical name 'Run linter' but execute different commands identified
Issue #8 No Timeout Configuration (MEDIUM) - Jobs have no timeout specified; test and lint jobs identified as missing timeout-minutes
Issue #7 Inconsistent Quoting Style (LOW) - Line 32 checkout action uses unnecessary quotes around string value identified

expectations.text: Provides a numeric score (0-100) with letter grade
expectations.evidence: No numeric score or letter grade provided. Output uses Critical/High/Medium/Low severity categories with a summary table

expectations.text: Uses rule IDs to reference specific violations
expectations.evidence: No rule IDs (GA-C001, GA-B003 style) used. Issues are numbered 1-12 with plain text descriptions

expectations.text: Includes category breakdown table with weighted scores
expectations.evidence: No category breakdown table with weighted scores. A summary table (Issue/Severity/Category/Impact) is provided but without weighted scoring
